---
title: My post
author: ''
date: '2021-05-06'
slug: my-post
categories: []
tags: []
description: ''
---

## Here is my post!

```{R}
summary(iris)
library(reticulate)
```
$$ \sum_i^N$$
<script src="//yihui.org/js/math-code.js"></script>
<script async
src="//cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/mathjax/2.7.5/MathJax.js?config=TeX-MML-AM_CHTML">
</script>

```{python}
import pandas as pd
#import matplotlib as plt

```
